ab: ne hucma a’o ho amo imia usa aiti ’o amo’u coni.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: isi eʉsvʉta a’mi, ’o patingsoha to sofʉ mo meoino ah’ʉtʉ.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: ne isi seolʉa no teovahi ’o sofʉ. i’mi to patingsoha to sofʉ ho supeohʉ.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: mo mahafo to fou ‘uachumu ho fi’i ’o amo’u ho faeni to amoconi.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: a’o ho amoconi mimia yontola yoni amiocni ho yupeahngʉyʉ, mo man’i ’o isi aangaezneni ci h’oehohanva.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: auyusi ne teo’cu mongoi, emomoengʉa to amoconi ho mi’ocu yubankake, maezo asuhcu mʉʉlʉlʉ.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: os’o yainca, “toteni ho tac’u yov’o ’o t’angosi, maezo sio uhta emoo’u no ta’esi.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, “When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.”
